*** 2 FATAL *** ***DELAYED REPORT*** SIGNIFICANT FLASH FLOODING OCCURRED IN PARTS OF GILA BEND, ARIZONA, EARLY SATURDAY MORNING, DUE TO A LARGE AREA OF 2 TO 4 INCHES OF RAIN THAT FELL SOUTH AND EAST OF THE CITY. WASHES WERE RUNNING WITH SIGNIFICANT FLOW WHICH CAUSED FLOODING OF SOME NEIGHBORHOODS. REPORTS INDICATE TWO FATALITIES OCCURRED, AND OVER 30 PEOPLE WERE RESCUED FROM FLOOD WATERS.
